textByHash.0b5f806f9145307be177b2a2e2865b3f91fcf8ac: My name is Brew'ma. I'm here to assist adventurers like you with potion making.
textByHash.4092b89dd72575dfdd3de4b2f7eac824cdca94ae: Sorry, I can't do anything with that.
textByHash.8b21e0d21be64d54eb1f003d6816185b4aa1fdc5: You don't have any Bruma herbs on you. I need them to finish the potions.
textByHash.a5f75cfbb7aec085aef252c31cba20c8596fa68c: You don't have any unfinished potions on you. I can't use the herbs without them.
textByHash.afdf1597034bc9d7be48a9eae7ee296814fc76d2: If you hand me a herb from the Bruma tree and one of the unfinished potions from the crate, I can combine the two if you lack the... talent to do so yourself.
